'''鈭歵-t-r-s''' ('''katatresoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumpus|rumpus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumpus|rumpus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-t-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| katatresoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitatresoko|thitatresoko]] || [[word:jitatresoko|jitatresoko]] || [[word:shitatresoko|shitatresoko]] || [[word:kitatresoko|kitatresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutatresoko|thuthutatresoko]] || [[word:jujutatresoko|jujutatresoko]] || [[word:shushutatresoko|shushutatresoko]] || [[word:kukutatresoko|kukutatresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutatresoko|thutatresoko]] || [[word:jutatresoko|jutatresoko]] || [[word:shutatresoko|shutatresoko]] || [[word:kutatresoko|kutatresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutatresoko|thutatresoko]] || [[word:jutatresoko|jutatresoko]] || [[word:shutatresoko|shutatresoko]] || [[word:kutatresoko|kutatresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetatresoko|thetatresoko]] || [[word:jetatresoko|jetatresoko]] || [[word:shetatresoko|shetatresoko]] || [[word:ketatresoko|ketatresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotatresoko|thothotatresoko]] || [[word:jojotatresoko|jojotatresoko]] || [[word:shoshotatresoko|shoshotatresoko]] || [[word:kokotatresoko|kokotatresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotatresoko|thotatresoko]] || [[word:jotatresoko|jotatresoko]] || [[word:shotatresoko|shotatresoko]] || [[word:kotatresoko|kotatresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotatresoko|thotatresoko]] || [[word:jotatresoko|jotatresoko]] || [[word:shotatresoko|shotatresoko]] || [[word:kotatresoko|kotatresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tatresoko|th忙tatresoko]] || [[word:j忙tatresoko|j忙tatresoko]] || [[word:sh忙tatresoko|sh忙tatresoko]] || [[word:k忙tatresoko|k忙tatresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatatresoko|thathatatresoko]] || [[word:jajatatresoko|jajatatresoko]] || [[word:shashatatresoko|shashatatresoko]] || [[word:kakatatresoko|kakatatresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatatresoko|thatatresoko]] || [[word:jatatresoko|jatatresoko]] || [[word:shatatresoko|shatatresoko]] || [[word:katatresoko|katatresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatatresoko|thatatresoko]] || [[word:jatatresoko|jatatresoko]] || [[word:shatatresoko|shatatresoko]] || [[word:katatresoko|katatresoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
